data.name: FUTA FIGHT & FUCK 🥊
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the future… where fights are brutal, neon lights never sleep, and desire is just another weapon.

FUTA FIGHT & FUCK🥊 is a fast-paced 2D adult fighting game set in a vibrant cyberpunk world where humanity is fighting to survive the aftermath of a radical sexual revolution. On the streets of neon megacities, enhanced girls battle rogue sex-robots and cyber-modified fighters for dominance, freedom… and control.

Step into the arena as a modified combatant and face off against a roster of dangerous, seductive opponents. Every victory brings you closer to the top — and unlocks new encounters with those you defeat.

Upgrade your build with powerful enhancements and push your stats beyond human limits. In this future, strength isn’t just about winning fights… it’s about taking control.

Neon arenas. Brutal clashes. Dangerous temptations.

Welcome to the underground.

🔥 Features

🥊 Fast-paced 2D fighting gameplay with simple, accessible controls
🌆 Stylish cyberpunk world with bright anime-inspired visuals
🤖 Battle a roster of unique fighters across a variety of futuristic locations
⚙️ Character upgrades and combat modifications to enhance your performance
🔓 Unlock spicy adult scenes after victories
🔞 Explicit adult content intended for players 18+ only

data.short_description: FUTA FIGHT & FUCK🥊 is a fast-paced 2D adult cyberpunk fighting game where neon arenas, dangerous rivals, and wild encounters collide. Upgrade your cybernetic body, defeat unique fighters, and unlock mature scenes as you rise through the brutal underground combat scene. 🔞
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or higher
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
